quests.title: Atlas Prime Rebuild
quests.desired_end_state: A verified Atlas Prime successor repository with controlled source evolution, equivalent Spear and Bow execution evidence, recovery proof, and an explicitly approved cutover from Atlas Codex.

emberline.current_gate: Gate 3 runner-neutral transaction and common receipt contracts.
completed_durable_work: Codex remains canonical and Prime remains SHADOW.
One Massive Arrow architecture is merged and read back.
Jayson approved Bow and Arrow CLI as the primary repository-mutation route for Gates 1-8.
The execution hierarchy is Athena first, Artemis Local Operator second, and Jayson as final manual fallback while Jayson remains ultimate authority.
Codex PR #184 was approved at 43a5a9295604be1d5aa8fb2a9b43675541075cee and squash-merged to Codex main 29e1b156316819f87511589bdca58ad120f787e3.
Prime PR #25 was approved at 1e5211cd1de00b70188a3a413d845826d898c624 and squash-merged to Prime main 525dfe23d130415f6acbba9ffd5e42d1bdee3fd8.
Codex continuity PR #185 was approved at 1eabc24046a777ccba44d9d8c33bbcc2cf2a5b80 and squash-merged to canonical Codex main 30b0f33ff571f8c2a7798224c34051781129b921.
The canonical Codex Workboard now records Gates 1-2 complete, Gate 3 active, and C07 preserved for Gate 8.
chat_only_or_uncertain: The Quest completion range remains broad pending Gate 3 contracts, Gates 4-7 runner and recovery proof, Gate 8 bounded migration, Quest Board cutover proof, rollback proof, and explicit authority transfer.
remaining_work: Create runner-neutral transaction, repository-subtransaction, authority, Build receipt, Execute receipt, and Noctua validation contracts in Gate 3.
Prove the harmless GitHub-native Spear Build route in Gate 4.
Prove equivalent local Bow execution against the same logical transaction in Gate 5.
Prove Artemis read-only validation without execution authority in Gate 6.
Prove multi-file, linked multi-repository, partial-state, and recovery behavior in Gate 7.
Resume C07 read-only semantic reconciliation and bounded migration in Gate 8.
Prove Quest Board cutover and rollback before any authority change.
emberline.protected_boundary_posture: No raw Drive, finance, health, clinic, runtime, account, network, device, or infrastructure evidence belongs in GitHub.
emberline.next_safe_action: Prepare the exact Gate 3 transaction and receipt contract file inventory, schemas, fixtures, Noctua profile, and Build Arrow Preview; stop before mutation.
emberline.next_approval_gate: Explicit Jayson approval of the exact Gate 3 Build Arrow after candidate files, hashes, tests, and stop conditions are shown.
must_not_happen_yet: Do not activate S1 or Artemis, begin Gate 4-8 execution, migrate C07 content, move or delete Drive material, promote Prime, retire Codex, delete evidence, or cut over.
Do not treat this SHADOW Quest Board as canonical or as authority to execute a later gate.

campaigns.title: Atlas Codex to Prime Migration
campaigns.current_gate: C07 is preserved for Gate 8 after Gates 3-7 capability and recovery proof.
blockers: Gates 3-7 capability and recovery proof must close before Gate 8 C07 migration work begins.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Preserve C07 unchanged while Gate 3 contracts and Gates 4-7 proof are completed.

campaigns.title: Google Drive Dependency Retirement
campaigns.current_gate: The GitHub governance foundation is merged; no Drive mutation or cleanup is authorized.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Continue read-only dependency reconciliation only when separately routed.

campaigns.title: Athena's Spear and Artemis's Bow and Arrow
campaigns.current_gate: Gate 3 runner-neutral transaction and common receipt contracts.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Prepare the exact Gate 3 contract Preview and stop before mutation.

campaigns.title: Quest Board and Emberline Architecture
campaigns.current_gate: SHADOW continuity is synchronized to canonical Codex main 30b0f33ff571f8c2a7798224c34051781129b921 and Gate 3 is active.
campaigns.next_safe_action: Keep authority SHADOW and update continuity only through reviewed transactions until cutover and rollback are separately proven.

completion_range.basis: Gates 1-2 architecture, execution convergence, exact-head merges, canonical Workboard reconciliation, and SHADOW continuity synchronization are complete; Gates 3-8, recovery proof, migration waves, rollback, and cutover remain.

quests.next_safe_action: Prepare the Gate 3 runner-neutral transaction and receipt contract Preview.
quests.next_approval_gate: Explicit Jayson approval of the exact Gate 3 Build Arrow after Preview.
